mapper.sql: t.id, t.order_version_id, t.order_id, t.version_no, t.change_type, t.change_reason, t.approval_id, t.trigger_source, t.trigger_user_id, t.effective_flag, t.effective_time, t.snapshot_json, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_version t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1 ORDER BY t.version_no DESC
SELECT FROM vso_order_version t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_version t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_version ( order_version_id, order_id, version_no, change_type, change_reason, approval_id, trigger_source, trigger_user_id, effective_flag, effective_time, snapshot_json, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{orderVersionId}, #{orderId}, #{versionNo}, #{changeType}, #{changeReason}, #{approvalId}, #{triggerSource}, #{triggerUserId}, #{effectiveFlag}, #{effectiveTime}, #{snapshotJson}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_version ( order_version_id, order_id, version_no, change_type, change_reason, approval_id, trigger_source, trigger_user_id, effective_flag, effective_time, snapshot_json, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.orderVersionId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.versionNo}, #{item.changeType}, #{item.changeReason}, #{item.approvalId}, #{item.triggerSource}, #{item.triggerUserId}, #{item.effectiveFlag}, #{item.effectiveTime}, #{item.snapshotJson}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_version t SET
t.effective_flag = #{effectiveFlag},
t.effective_time = #{effectiveTime},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_version t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
